classification: the rocprofiler-compute install is missing its full requirement set; each install reveals more (deep viz/dash chain). Even if fully satisfied, rocprof-compute WRAPS rocprofv3's PMC counter backend, which returns 0 for compute counters on this gfx1100+ROCm-7.2.4 stack -> a working UI over a 0-counter backend.
decision: DO NOT FIX — unbounded dep chain + low value (0-counter backend); and it would only help the llama/HIP side, never HCQ.
if_fixed_helps: llama/HIP counter analysis ONLY (and even those compute counters read 0 here); NOTHING for tinygrad HCQ
